sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20499" key="boubwni/skos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βουβων-ίσκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n20499.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bandage for the groin</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:55" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.55</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
